languages.text: {n}Хейнрикс произносит так, чтобы слышали только вы:{/n} "Похоже, он принял нас — вас — за агента Инквизиции".
{n}Heinrix pitches his voice low so that only you can hear:{/n} "He seems to have mistaken us — you — for an agent of the Inquisition."
languages.original_text: {n}Хейнрикс произносит так, чтобы слышали только вы:{/n} "Похоже, он принял нас — вас — за агента Инквизиции".

traits.locale_text: {n}Heinrix pitches his voice low so that only you can hear:{/n} "He seems to have mistaken us — you — for an agent of the Inquisition."
{n}Heinrix pitches his voice low so that only you can hear:{/n} "He seems to have mistaken us — you — for an agent of the Inquisition."
{n}Heinrix pitches his voice low so that only you can hear:{/n} "He seems to have mistaken us — you — for an agent of the Inquisition."

languages.text: {n}海因里希压低了嗓音，只让你一人听见：{/n}“他好像把咱们，或者说把您，当成审判庭的特工了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix pitches his voice low so that only you can hear:{/n} "He seems to have mistaken us — you — for an agent of the Inquisition."

traits.locale_text: {n}海因里希压低了嗓音，只让你一人听见：{/n}“他好像把咱们，或者说把您，当成审判庭的特工了。”

languages.text: {n}Heinrix parle si bas que vous {mf|seul|seule} pouvez l'entendre :{/n} « Manifestement, il nous... il vous prend à tort pour un agent de l'Inquisition. »
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix pitches his voice low so that only you can hear:{/n} "He seems to have mistaken us — you — for an agent of the Inquisition."

traits.locale_text: {n}Heinrix parle si bas que vous {mf|seul|seule} pouvez l'entendre :{/n} « Manifestement, il nous... il vous prend à tort pour un agent de l'Inquisition. »

languages.text: {n}Heinrix, sesini sadece senin duyabileceğin kadar alçaltıyor.{/n} "Anlaşılan bizi... Sizi Engizisyon'un ajanı sanmış."
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix pitches his voice low so that only you can hear:{/n} "He seems to have mistaken us — you — for an agent of the Inquisition."

traits.locale_text: {n}Heinrix, sesini sadece senin duyabileceğin kadar alçaltıyor.{/n} "Anlaşılan bizi... Sizi Engizisyon'un ajanı sanmış."

languages.text: {n}Heinrix baja la voz para que solo tú puedas oírle:{/n} «Parece habernos... haberle confundido con un{mf||a} agente de la Inquisición».
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix pitches his voice low so that only you can hear:{/n} "He seems to have mistaken us — you — for an agent of the Inquisition."

traits.locale_text: {n}Heinrix baja la voz para que solo tú puedas oírle:{/n} «Parece habernos... haberle confundido con un{mf||a} agente de la Inquisición».

languages.text: {n}Heinrix senkt seine Stimme, damit nur du sie hören kannst.{/n} "Er scheint uns — Euch — für {mf|einen Agenten|eine Agentin} der Inquisition zu halten."
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix pitches his voice low so that only you can hear:{/n} "He seems to have mistaken us — you — for an agent of the Inquisition."

traits.locale_text: {n}Heinrix senkt seine Stimme, damit nur du sie hören kannst.{/n} "Er scheint uns — Euch — für {mf|einen Agenten|eine Agentin} der Inquisition zu halten."

languages.text: {n}ヘインリクスは声のトーンを下げて、あなただけに聞こえるように言った。{/n}「彼は、私たち、あなたを、宗教裁判所の代理人だと勘違いしたようですね。」
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix pitches his voice low so that only you can hear:{/n} "He seems to have mistaken us — you — for an agent of the Inquisition."

traits.locale_text: {n}ヘインリクスは声のトーンを下げて、あなただけに聞こえるように言った。{/n}「彼は、私たち、あなたを、宗教裁判所の代理人だと勘違いしたようですね。」
